title: Your CD and Blu-Ray collection won't last forever - Engadget
summary: One of the greatest risks to your media collection is known as disc rot. Affecting CDs, Blu-rays and DVDs alike, disc rot occurs when environmental factors degrade the reflective side of compact discs.
caption: output/2026-07-21/your-cd-and-blu-ray-collection-won-t-last-forever-engadget.txt
